value.found_quote: In AntiGravity user settings i have enabled everywhere, where its possible that the model auto proceeds. My deny list is also empty. My problem is, it still asks for input on my side.
value.rationale: The page is a Google AI Developers Forum thread about "Google Antigravity" describing user-configurable policy/permission settings (auto-proceed, deny list, "Always run" permissions, allowed list, terminal command auto execution, browser and tmp permissions). These describe the guardrails/policy controls referenced in the claim. The page presents Antigravity as a current product (recent dated posts), so lifecycle is active. The page describes the feature though it is largely framed around bugs in its behavior.
